name: io.github.chrischall/ioffice-mcp
description: iOffice workspace and facility management for Claude — book rooms, manage visitors, file maintenance requests, and more via natural language

environmentVariables.name: IOFFICE_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Your iOffice API token (preferred over username/password)

environmentVariables.name: IOFFICE_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: Your iOffice username (used if no API token)

environmentVariables.name: IOFFICE_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Your iOffice password (used if no API token)
